response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js, and direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators and agentic tooling), which is a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, test-runner authorship, testing workshops), database and container experience, and a CS degree round out the profile. The main gaps are no stated Nest.js experience, more Ember.js than React depth on the frontend, and limited Kotlin exposure, but these are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot track record.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with current TypeScript/Node.js product work
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling development experience, matching a hard-to-find requirement
Deep testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned, a core framework in the primary stack
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
Kotlin not listed and Java experience appears dated and secondary

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and shallow React depth
